name: Cherry No Bake Rum Balls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dark Sweet Cherries, Well Pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly mix all ingredients together, except the powdered sugar, in a large bowl.
2. Blend well until combined.
3. Shape the mixture into 1-inch balls.
4. Roll each ball in the powdered sugar until completely coated.
5. Place the coated balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours to set.
7. Yield: Approximately 100-125 Rum Balls.
